description_long: An elderly person is depicted standing with arms slightly outstretched and feet apart. The individual has short, white hair and a lightly wrinkled face, suggesting advanced age. They are dressed in a plain white short-sleeved shirt and dark pants, with bare feet visible. The body proportions are realistic, and the skin tone is a natural light brown. The figure's posture is upright, and the facial expression is neutral, with no visible accessories or walking aids. The overall appearance is casual and suitable for an urban environment such as a sidewalk or park.
description: An elderly person with short white hair, a white shirt, dark pants, and bare feet stands upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a neutral expression and realistic proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elderly person's face, white shirt, dark pants, and both arms and feet clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm, and the side of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side of the shirt and pants.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual attire consisting of a plain white short-sleeved shirt and dark pants, with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and feet apart.
attribute_hairstyle: Short, white hair with a slightly wavy texture.
attribute_facial_features: Lightly wrinkled face, no facial hair, no glasses, and a neutral expression.
